subject: Upgrade maven-install-plugin to 3.1.0
commit_message:
Upgrade maven-install-plugin to 3.1.0

Issue-ID: POLICY-4498
Signed-off-by: jhh <jorge.hernandez-herrero@att.com>
Change-Id: Ie317f30bc0896f6d4ec73110b9e1cbf869f2d16a

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

attempt to correct drools-applications build which fails right at the start of the build with this error below.   The problem does not happen in local environment.

[ERROR] Failed to execute goal org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-install-plugin:3.0.0-M1:install (default-install) on project drools-applications: ArtifactInstallerException: com.google.inject.ProvisionException: Unable to provision, see the following errors:
[ERROR] 
[ERROR] 1) Error injecting: private org.eclipse.aether.spi.log.Logger org.apache.maven.repository.internal.DefaultVersionRangeResolver.logger
[ERROR] while locating org.apache.maven.repository.internal.DefaultVersionRangeResolver
[ERROR] while locating java.lang.Object annotated with *
[ERROR] at org.eclipse.sisu.wire.LocatorWiring
[ERROR] while locating org.eclipse.aether.impl.VersionRangeResolver
[ERROR] for parameter 2 at org.eclipse.aether.internal.impl.collect.DefaultDependencyCollector.<init>(Unknown Source)
[ERROR] at ClassRealm[extension>org.kie:kie-maven-plugin:8.32.0.Final, parent: jdk.internal.loader.ClassLoaders$AppClassLoader@277050dc] (via modules: org.eclipse.sisu.wire.WireModule -> org.eclipse.sisu.plexus.PlexusBindingModule)
